nodes.name: Update Contact + Route to Existing Owner

parameters.content:
## OLDEV: Inbound Lead Router, Enricher & Deduper
Validate, enrich, dedupe, branch (new / returning), round-robin assign, notify. Fully synthetic sample data; CRM / Slack integration points are stubbed as NoOp so it runs with zero credentials.

### Validate & route
Invalid syntax and role-based addresses (info@, noreply@) are quarantined before they reach the CRM. Protects sender reputation and keeps the list clean.

main.node: Update Contact + Route to Existing Owner
